name: kilnx
description: Write, read, debug, and refactor Kilnx code. Kilnx is a declarative backend language that compiles .kilnx source files to a single standalone Go binary.

interface.shortDescription: Declarative backend language with database, auth, pages, and htmx
interface.longDescription: Kilnx covers database models, auth, pages, actions, fragments, SSE, WebSockets, jobs, schedules, webhooks, tests, i18n, LLM integration, and PDF generation in ~30 keywords. It compiles to a standalone Go binary with zero runtime dependencies.
interface.defaultPrompt: Write or refactor a Kilnx backend app with database models, auth, pages, actions, and htmx
